allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('share'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('globe'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('heart'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('star'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('pen'\)\).slice\(0,20\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.endsWith\('Icon'\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('globe'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('share2'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('network'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => ['HeartPulse','PenTool','MessageSquare'].includes\(k\)\)\)")
